### main backend

```
\-- construct and map
    \-- __construct
        \-- component - define the settings for this view component object
        \-- component_link - set the user and fix the setting of this component link object
        \-- formula - define the settings for this formula object
        \-- formula_map - define the settings for this formula object
        \-- value - set the user, which is needed in all cases and the main vars with the object creation
        \-- verb - set the main mandatory vars of this verb object
        \-- view - define the settings for this view object
    \-- reset
        \-- component - clear the view component object values
        \-- component_link - set the vars of this component link object to the default values
        \-- formula - clear the view component object values
        \-- formula_map - clear the view component object values
        \-- verb - set the vars of this verb object to the default values
        \-- view - define the settings for this view object
    \-- row_mapper_sandbox
        \-- component - map the database fields to the object fields
        \-- component_link - map the database fields to the object fields
        \-- formula_map - map the database fields to the object fields
        \-- view - map the database fields to the object fields
    \-- api_mapper
        \-- component - map a component api json to this model component object
        \-- component_link - map a component api json to this model component link object
        \-- formula_map - map a formula api json to this model formula object
        \-- value - map a numeric value api json to this model value object
        \-- verb - map a verb api json to this model verb object
        \-- view - map a view api json to this model view object
    \-- import_mapper
        \-- component - import a view component from a JSON object
        \-- component_link - set the vars of this component link object based on the given json without writing to the database
        \-- formula_map - set the vars of this formula object based on the given json without writing to the database
        \-- verb - function to import the core user sandbox object values from a json string
        \-- view - set the vars of this view object based on the given json without writing to the database
    \-- common_mapper
        \-- verb - function to import the core user sandbox object values from a json string
    \-- row_mapper_typ_obj
        \-- verb - interface function for initial csv import
    \-- row_mapper_verb
        \-- verb - set the class vars based on a database record
\-- api
    \-- api_json_array
        \-- component - create an array for the api json creation
        \-- component_link - create an array for the api json creation
        \-- formula_map - create an array for the api json creation
        \-- value - create an array for the api json creation
        \-- verb - create an array for the api json creation
        \-- view - create an array for the api json creation
\-- im- and export
    \-- 1
        \-- formula_map - import a formula from a JSON object
        \-- verb - add a verb in the database from an imported json object of external database from
        \-- view - import a view from a JSON object
    \-- export_json
        \-- component - create an array with the export json fields
        \-- component_link - create an array with the export json fields of this component
        \-- formula_map - create an array with the export json fields
        \-- value - create an array with the export json fields
        \-- verb - create an array with the export json fields
        \-- view - create an array with the export json fields
\-- set and get
    \-- set_type
        \-- component - set the predefined view component type by the given code id or name
        \-- formula_map - set the predefined type of this formula by the given code id or name
        \-- view - set the view type by the given code id or name
    \-- 10
        \-- component_link - @return string|null the code id of the position type for the component in the linked view by the database id
    \-- set_style
        \-- component - set the default style for this component by the code id
        \-- component_link - set the style for this component link that overwrites the view and component style
        \-- view - set the default style for this view by the code id
    \-- set_style_by_id
        \-- component - set the default style for this component by the database id
        \-- component_link - set the style for this component link by the database id
        \-- view - set the default style for this view by the database id
    \-- get_style
        \-- component - @return view_style|type_object|null the view style for this component or null if the parent style should be used
        \-- component_link - @return type_object|null the view style or null
        \-- view - @return view_style|type_object|null the view style for this component or null if the parent style should be used
    \-- get_style_id
        \-- component - @return int|null the database id of the view style or null
        \-- component_link - @return int|null the database id of the view style or null
        \-- view - @return int|null the database id of the view style or null
    \-- set_row_phrase
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table rows
    \-- get_row_phrase_id
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table rows
    \-- get_row_phrase_name
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table rows
    \-- set_col_phrase
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table columns
    \-- get_col_phrase_id
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table columns
    \-- get_col_phrase_name
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used to select the table columns
    \-- set_col_sub_phrase
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used as the second selection for table columns
    \-- get_col_sub_phrase_id
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used as the second selection for table columns
    \-- get_col_sub_phrase_name
        \-- component - define or remove the phrase that is used as the second selection for table columns
    \-- set_ui_msg_code_id
        \-- component - set the ui message code id of this object to write the change to the db
    \-- get_ui_msg_code_id
        \-- component - @return msg_id|null the message id or null
    \-- set_ui_msg_code_id_vars
        \-- component - set the ui message code id to be used after the number to write the change to the db
    \-- get_ui_msg_code_id_vars
        \-- component - @return msg_id|null the message id or null
    \-- set_ui_msg_code_id_exception
        \-- component - set the ui message code id to be used as an exception to write the change to the db
    \-- get_ui_msg_code_id_exception
        \-- component - @return msg_id|null the message id or null
    \-- set_ui_msg_value_exception
        \-- component - set the value to select the exception message to write the change to the db
    \-- get_ui_msg_value_exception
        \-- component - @return float|null the message id or null
    \-- set_formula_by_id
        \-- component - set the formula of the component by the id
    \-- set_formula
        \-- component - set the formula used for the component
    \-- get_formula
        \-- component - set the formula used for the component
    \-- get_formula_id
        \-- component - set the formula used for the component
    \-- set_link_type
        \-- component - set the type of linked components
    \-- set_join
        \-- component - TODO use a set_join function for all not simple sql joins
    \-- get_view
        \-- component_link - rename to standard link from object to view
    \-- view_id
        \-- component_link - rename to standard link from object to view
    \-- component_id
        \-- component_link - rename to standard link from object to view
    \-- get_component
        \-- component_link - rename to standard link to object to component
    \-- get_pos
        \-- component_link - expose the order number as pos
    \-- set_link_objects
        \-- component_link - copy the link objects from this object to the given component_link
    \-- get_key
        \-- component_link - @return string a unique key including the position of the component link based on the names of the view and component
    \-- get_predicate_code_id
        \-- component_link - overwrite the link type function
    \-- set_view_id
        \-- formula_map - @param int $id the id of the default view that should be remembered
    \-- get_view_id
        \-- formula_map - @return int the id of the default view for this word or null if no view is preferred
    \-- set_user_text
        \-- formula_map - update the expression by setting the human-readable format and try to update the database reference format
    \-- get_usr_text
        \-- formula_map - update the expression by setting the human-readable format and try to update the database reference format
    \-- get_ref_text
        \-- formula_map - update the expression by setting the human-readable format and try to update the database reference format
    \-- set_latex
        \-- formula_map - @param string|null $latex the formula in latex format
    \-- get_latex
        \-- formula_map - @return string|null the formula in latex format
    \-- set_value
        \-- value - overwrite the sandbox_value set_value() function to set the numeric value
    \-- get_value
        \-- value - overwrite the sandbox_value value() function to return the numeric value
    \-- set
        \-- verb - set the most used object vars with one set statement
    \-- set_name
        \-- verb - @param string|null $name the unique name of the verb
    \-- set_user
        \-- verb - set the user of the verb
    \-- get_code_id
        \-- verb - @return string a unique name for the verb that is also used in the code
    \-- get_description
        \-- verb - @return string the description of the verb
    \-- get_user
        \-- verb - @return user|null the person who wants to see this verb
    \-- components
        \-- view - @return component_list the list of the linked components of this view
    \-- component_links
        \-- view - @return int the number of linked components of this view
\-- preloaded
    \-- type_code_id
        \-- component - @return string|null the code_id of the component type
        \-- formula_map - @return string|null the code_id of the formula type
        \-- view - get the view type code id based on the database id set in this object
    \-- type_name
        \-- component - @return string the name of the component type
        \-- formula_map - @return string the name of the formula type
        \-- view - @return string the name of the view type
    \-- type_name_or_null
        \-- component - get the name of the component type or null if no type is set
    \-- predicate_name
        \-- component_link - @return string the name of the preloaded view component link type
\-- load
    \-- load_by_name
        \-- component - just set the class name for the user sandbox function
        \-- verb - load a verb by the verb name
    \-- load_by_id
        \-- component - just set the class name for the user sandbox function
    \-- load_by_link
        \-- component_link - load a named user sandbox object by name
    \-- load_by_link_and_pos
        \-- component_link - load the component link by the unique link ids including the pos
    \-- load_by_link_and_type
        \-- component_link - load the component_link by the link id
    \-- load_standard_by_type_link
        \-- component_link - load the object parameters for all users by the link ids
    \-- load_max_pos_by_view
        \-- component_link - load the component_link by the link id
    \-- load_standard_by_link
        \-- component_link - load the object parameters for all users by the link id
    \-- load_by_code_id
        \-- verb - load a verb by the verb name
    \-- load_by_phrase
        \-- view - load the suggested view for a phrase
    \-- load_by_term
        \-- view - load the suggested view for a term
\-- load sql
    \-- 3
        \-- verb - create an SQL statement to retrieve a verb by code id from the database
    \-- 1
        \-- view - create an SQL statement to retrieve a view by the phrase from the database
    \-- load_sql
        \-- component - create the common part of an SQL statement to retrieve the parameters of a view component from the database
        \-- component_link - create the common part of an SQL statement to retrieve the parameters of a view component link from the database
        \-- formula_map - create the common part of an SQL statement to retrieve
        \-- verb - create the common part of an SQL statement to retrieve the parameters of a verb from the database
        \-- view - create the common part of an SQL statement to retrieve the parameters of a view from the database
    \-- load_sql_user_changes
        \-- component - create an SQL statement to retrieve the user changes of the current view component
        \-- component_link - create an SQL statement to retrieve the user changes of the current view component link
    \-- load_sql_by_link_and_type
        \-- component_link - create an SQL statement to load the component_link by the link id
    \-- load_sql_by_link_and_pos
        \-- component_link - create an SQL statement to retrieve a user sandbox link by the ids of the linked objects from the database
    \-- load_sql_max_pos
        \-- component_link - create a simple SQL statement to retrieve the max order number of one view
\-- sql fields
    \-- 3
        \-- component_link - to load the related objects if the link object is loaded by an external query like in user_display to show the sandbox
    \-- name_field
        \-- component - create an SQL statement to retrieve the user changes of the current view component
        \-- component_link - @return string the field name of the name db field as a function for complex overwrites
        \-- formula_map - load all missing result phrases used in the expression

\-- construct and map
    \-- __construct
        \-- sql_creator - set the default sql_creator configuration
        \-- element - always set the user because a formula element is always user-specific
        \-- expression - 
        \-- combine_object - a combine object always covers an existing object
        \-- data_object - always set the user because always someone must have requested to create the list
        \-- db_cache - always set the status
        \-- db_object_multi_user - @param user $usr the user how has requested to see his view on the object
        \-- system_object - always set the user because someone must always have requested to create the list
        \-- change_log - always set the user because a change log list is always user-specific
        \-- text_log - 
        \-- phrase_types - @param bool $usr_can_add true by default to allow searching by name for new added phrase types
        \-- ref_list - define the settings for this ref list object
        \-- sandbox_link_list - 
        \-- sandbox_list - always set the user because a link list is always user-specific
        \-- sandbox_value_list - 
        \-- job_list - always set the user because a job list either user-specific or linked to the system user
        \-- value_geo - set the user, which is needed in all cases and the main vars with the object creation
        \-- value_text - set the user, which is needed in all cases and the main vars with the object creation
        \-- value_time - set the user, which is needed in all cases and the main vars with the object creation
        \-- value_time_series - set the user sandbox type for a value time series object and set the user, which is needed in all cases
        \-- verb_list - define the settings for this verb list object
    \-- reset
        \-- element - reset the vars of this element
        \-- combine_named - set the object vars of a phrase or term to the neutral initial value
        \-- db_cache - clear all cache object values e.g. to detect the changed fields
        \-- change_field - set the vars of this change field object to the default values
        \-- ref_type - set the vars of this reference type object to the default values
        \-- sandbox_code_id - reset the object vars e.g. to detect the vars changed by the api versus the db value
        \-- sandbox_predicated_link - reset the type of the link object
        \-- ip_range - 
        \-- value_time_series - set the user sandbox type for a value time series object and set the user, which is needed in all cases
    \-- clone_all
        \-- element - clone this object and all linked objects
    \-- row_mapper_sandbox
        \-- element - map the formula element database fields for a later load of the object
        \-- sandbox_code_id - map the database fields to the object fields
    \-- api_mapper
        \-- element - map an element api json to this model element object
        \-- db_id_object_non_sandbox - fill the vars with this db id object based on the given api json array
        \-- phrase_list - map a phrase list api json to this model phrase list object
        \-- sandbox_code_id - set the vars of this object bases on the api json array
        \-- sandbox_value_list - map a figure list api json to this model figure list object
        \-- value_geo - map a geo value api json to this model value object
        \-- value_text - map a time value api json to this model value object
        \-- value_time - map a time value api json to this model value object
    \-- row_mapper
        \-- db_cache - map the database fields to one change log entry to this log object
        \-- db_object_key - dummy map function to be overwritten by the child object
        \-- db_object_no_id - dummy map function to be overwritten by the child object
        \-- change - map the database fields to one change log entry to this log object
        \-- change_value - map the database fields to one change log entry to this log object
        \-- ip_range - map the database fields to this ip range object
    \-- row_mapper_typ_obj

        \-- ref_type - fill the reference type object vars based on an array of fields from the database
    \-- import_mapper
        \-- phrase_list - import a phrase list from an inner part of a JSON array object
        \-- ref_type - function to import the core reference type values from a json string
        \-- sandbox_code_id - to import the user sandbox object from a json string
        \-- ip_range - set the vars of this ip range object based on the given json without writing to the database
    \-- load_dummy
        \-- phrase_types - adding the word types used for unit tests to the dummy list
    \-- default_id

    \-- sql_par

        \-- sql_creator - define a field that is taken from a complex sub query that is not yet created

\-- info sql type
    \-- do_log
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if the changes should be added to the change log
    \-- no_log
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if the changes should never be added to the change log
    \-- no_id_field
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if the field list should not include the id field e.g. because the field list is used for a pure insert statement
    \-- is_call_only
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if only the sql function name should be created
    \-- is_insert
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if an insert sql statement should be created
    \-- is_update
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if an update sql statement should be created
    \-- is_delete
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if a delete sql statement should be created
    \-- is_select
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if a delete sql statement should be created
\-- info for value table selection
    \-- is_most
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true to select the table for values and results linked to an average number of phrases
    \-- is_main
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true to select the table for values and results linked to an a bit more number of phrases
    \-- is_prime
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true to select the table for values and results linked to only a few fields
    \-- is_big
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true to select the table for values and results linked to many fields
    \-- value_table_type
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true to select the table for values and results linked to many fields
\-- info for sql functions
    \-- is_usr_tbl
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql should point to the user sandbox table
    \-- is_usr_tbl_and_select
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql should point to the user sandbox table and only the values for the given user should be selected
    \-- is_norm
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql should return the normal values and not the user-specific
    \-- is_standard
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if only the value without the sandbox parameters like share and protection should be saved
    \-- get_all
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql return all database rows
    \-- is_geo
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql uses geo point values
    \-- is_sub_tbl
        \-- sql_type_list - @return bool true if sql is supposed to be part of another sql statement

\-- sql

    \-- load_names
        \-- phrase_list - load a list of phrase names
\-- sql create
    \-- sql_table_create
        \-- db_object - the sql statement to create the table for this (or a child) object
        \-- db_object_key - the sql statement to create the table for this (or a child) object
        \-- db_object_no_id - the sql statement to create the table for this (or a child) object
    \-- sql_truncate_create
        \-- db_object - the name of the sql table for this (or a child) object

        \-- db_object_no_id - the sql statement to create the indices for this (or a child) object

        \-- db_object_key - the sql statement to create the foreign keys for this (or a child) object
        \-- db_object_no_id - the sql statement to create the foreign keys for this (or a child) object
    \-- sql_table
        \-- change_log - the sql statements to create a change log table
        \-- value_ts_data - the sql statement to create the table
    \-- sql_index
        \-- change_log - the sql statements to create all indices for a change log table
        \-- value_ts_data - the sql statement to create the database indices
    \-- sql_foreign_key

        \-- value_ts_data - the sql statements to create all foreign keys

    \-- load_sql_by_status

\-- cast
    \-- term_list
        \-- phrase_list - @return term_list filled with all phrases from this phrase list
        \-- verb_list - adding the verbs used for unit tests to the dummy list
\-- select
    \-- are_and_contains
        \-- phrase_list - makes sure that all combinations of "are" and "contains" are included
    \-- differentiators
        \-- phrase_list - add all potential differentiator phrases of the phrase lst e.g. get "energy" for "sector"
    \-- differentiators_all
        \-- phrase_list - same as differentiators, but including the subtypes e.g. get "energy" and "wind energy" for "sector" if "wind energy" is part of "energy"
    \-- differentiators_filtered
        \-- phrase_list - similar to differentiators, but only a filtered list of differentiators is viewed to increase speed
    \-- best_matching_time
        \-- phrase_list - to get the best matching time phrase from the list based on the given point in time,
    \-- get_year
        \-- phrase_list - to get the best matching time phrase from the list based on the given point in time,
\-- check
    \-- is_valid
        \-- phrase_list - @return bool true if this phrase list has at least one entry

        \-- sandbox_list - check if the user of the object to add matches the user of the list
    \-- includes
        \-- ip_range - check if an ip address is within this range

    \-- val_lst
        \-- phrase_list - @return value_list all values related to this phrase list
    \-- frm_lst

```
\-- api

        \-- change_log_named - set the vars of this object bases on the api json array
        \-- source - set the vars of this source frontend object bases on the api json array
    \-- 1
        \-- sys_log_list - create the api json message string of this list that can be sent to the backend
    \-- api_array
        \-- component - TODO all set_from_json_array functions should only use json_fields not api::FLD
        \-- component_link - create an api json array for the backend based on this frontend object
        \-- element - create an api json array for the backend based on this frontend object
        \-- formula_link - create an api json array for the backend based on this frontend object
        \-- source - @return array the json message array to send the updated data to the backend
        \-- sandbox - @return array the json message array to send the updated data to the backend
        \-- sandbox_code_id - @return array the json message array to send the updated data to the backend

        \-- view_relation - create an api json array for the backend based on this frontend object
        \-- triple - @return array the json message array to send the updated data to the backend
    \-- api_get
        \-- frontend - get an api json as a string from the backend
\-- base
    \-- 1
        \-- source - display the source name with the tooltip
    \-- name_link
        \-- component - create the html code to show the component name with the link to change the component parameters
        \-- source - display the source name with a link to the main page for the source
        \-- list_named - @param string $back the back trace url for the undo functionality
        \-- triple - display a triple with a link to the main page for the triple
    \-- val_formatted
        \-- figure - @return bool true if this figure has been calculated based on other numbers
    \-- name_linked
        \-- figure - @param phrase_list|null $phr_lst_header list of phrases that are shown already in the context e.g. the table header and that should not be shown again
    \-- display
        \-- figure - return the html code to display a value
        \-- figure_list - @return string with a list of the figure names with html links
    \-- display_linked
        \-- figure - html code to show the value with the possibility to click for the result explanation
        \-- figure_list - @param string $back the back trace url for the undo functionality
    \-- names_linked
        \-- figure_list - @param string $back the back trace url for the undo functionality
        \-- list_named - @param string $back the back trace url for the undo functionality

    \-- br

    \-- term_by_obj_id
        \-- term_list - get a term from the term list selected by the word, triple, formula or verb id
    \-- name_tip
        \-- list_named - to show the list name to the user in the most simple form (without any ids)
    \-- names
        \-- list_named - @param ?int $limit the max number of ids to show
\-- select
    \-- component_type_selector
        \-- component - create the HTML code to select a component type
    \-- type_selector
        \-- component - create the HTML code to select a view type
    \-- style_selector
        \-- component - create the HTML code to select a view style
    \-- children
        \-- phrase_list - get all phrases that are connected to the given phrase
    \-- parents
        \-- phrase_list - get all phrases that are connected to the given phrase
    \-- parent_triples
        \-- phrase_list - get all triples that are connected to the given phrase
    \-- 1
        \-- word_list - add the word list default values to the selector function
    \-- assume_time
        \-- phrase_list - get the most useful time for the given phrases
        \-- word_list - get the most useful time for the given list
    \-- wrd_lst_all
        \-- phrase_list - build a word list including the triple words or in other words flatten the list e.g. for parent inclusions
    \-- word_list

    \-- triple_list
